nodes.context: British hip hop collective based in Broadwater Farm, North London, prominent in UK drill.
Road rap group from the 2000s, offshoot from Tottenham Mandem gang.
Gang from Tottenham, parent group of Star Gang.
UK drill group mentioned as influence on Bandokay.
Tottenham gang linked to convicted group in SJ's murder case.

edges.evidence_quote: They were both originally rappers in Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s and an offshoot group from the Tottenham Mandem gang.
edges.context: Star Gang is an offshoot of Tottenham Mandem.

edges.evidence_quote: They were both originally rappers in Star Gang, a road rap group from the 2000s and an offshoot group from the Tottenham Mandem gang.
edges.context: Headie One and RV, prominent OFB members, were originally in Star Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Bandokay credited fellow OFB rapper Headie One as a major influence, as well as UK drill group 67 and American rapper Lil Durk.
The convicted group was reportedly linked to Tottenham gang NPK.
edges.context: SJ and others convicted of murder were linked to NPK; SJ is an OFB member.
